visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting the biometric at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 140
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Lithuania Visa application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification
visa_types.processing_time: An application for the national visa in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance. The Average processing time is 45 days.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/kita4 (https://www.migracija.lt/en/kita4)

## Visa Fees
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting the biometric at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 140
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Lithuania Visa application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/kita4 (https://www.migracija.lt/en/kita4)

## Processing Time
An application for the national visa in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance. The Average processing time is 45 days.

visa_types.name: Issuing new TRP card
visa_types.documents_required: For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Temporary Residence Permit card fee and VFS Service Fee.
Fees to be paid while submitting new biometric data (Photo, fingerprints, signature) at the Visa Application Centre.
New TRP Card fee is EUR 45. Additionally, VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application centre.
You will find more information on this fee under the “Attend a Centre” tab.
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification
visa_types.processing_time: The average processing time to issue a new Temporary Resident Permit card is 10 working days. The applicant is informed about the new card by a message on Migris. New TRP card can be collected at the Visa Application Centre in Dubai.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreign nationals can now apply for a new Temporary Residence Permit card, if lost. No appointment required. Please submit a report about a lost TRP card and fill up an application for issuing a new permit card on MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/noriu-prane%C5%A1ti-apie-prarast%C4%85-dokument%C4%852 (https://www.migracija.lt/noriu-prane%C5%A1ti-apie-prarast%C4%85-dokument%C4%852)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreign nationals can now apply for a new Temporary Residence Permit card, if lost. No appointment required. Please submit a report about a lost TRP card and fill up an application for issuing a new permit card on MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/noriu-prane%C5%A1ti-apie-prarast%C4%85-dokument%C4%852 (https://www.migracija.lt/noriu-prane%C5%A1ti-apie-prarast%C4%85-dokument%C4%852)

## Visa Fees

Temporary Residence Permit card fee and VFS Service Fee.
Fees to be paid while submitting new biometric data (Photo, fingerprints, signature) at the Visa Application Centre.
New TRP Card fee is EUR 45. Additionally, VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application centre.
You will find more information on this fee under the “Attend a Centre” tab.
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)

## Processing Time
The average processing time to issue a new Temporary Resident Permit card is 10 working days. The applicant is informed about the new card by a message on Migris. New TRP card can be collected at the Visa Application Centre in Dubai.

## Overview
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)

## Visa Fees
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee  
Visa fee to be paid while submitting the biometric at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 160 
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab

All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision. 
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)

## Processing Time
An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance. The average visa processing time is between 1 to 3 months.

## Visa Fees
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee  
Visa fee to be paid while submitting the biometric at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 160
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)

## Processing Time
An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance. The average visa processing time is between 1 to 3 months.

visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting biometrics at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 110 or EUR 80 in case a foreigner admitted to full-time consecutive studies at a higher education institution pursuant to international treaties concluded by Lithuania, agreements concluded on behalf of ministries or Government bodies, other state institutions or bodies and within their competence with the relevant institutions of foreign countries
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting biometrics at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is EUR 110 or EUR 80 in case a foreigner admitted to full-time consecutive studies at a higher education institution pursuant to international treaties concluded by Lithuania, agreements concluded on behalf of ministries or Government bodies, other state institutions or bodies and within their competence with the relevant institutions of foreign countries
An additional VFS Service Fee of EUR 110 will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance. The average visa processing time is between 1 to 3 months.

Please be informed that the fees charged by the Ministry for Interior or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit (https://www.migracija.lt/en/temporary-residence-permit)

## Processing Time
An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance. The average visa processing time is between 1 to 3 months.
